_synthetic: SYNTHETIC — no real patient data (rules.md §2.2). Hand-written transcript that pairs with tests/fixtures/chest_pain_mid_case.json: same session_id + turn_ids; adds turn text so the UI can render the transcript panel. Demo beat: 52-year-old reports exertional chest pain radiating to left arm with diaphoresis; prior CAD; smoker; no pleuritic component; not reproducible with palpation. Matches the case in PRD.md §9.

turns.speaker: physician
turns.text: Thanks for coming in. What's been bothering you today?

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: I've had this heavy pressure in my chest on and off for a couple of days.

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: It comes on when I walk up the stairs at home, and it eases when I sit down.

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: It sort of spreads down my left arm when it's at its worst.

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: I get sweaty too — a cold sweat — while it's happening.

turns.speaker: physician
turns.text: Any prior heart history I should know about?

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: Yes — I had a stent placed about six years ago for a blocked artery.

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: I'm still smoking, about half a pack a day. I know, I know.

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: Taking a deep breath doesn't make it worse — it's not that kind of pain.

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: And pressing on my chest here doesn't do anything either.
